entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY THIS MORNING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY SUNNY
A SLIGHT CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS, MAINLY THIS MORNING
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING, THEN MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE MID 50S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE MORNING, THEN A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE AFTERNOON
COOLER
LESS HUMID WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
WEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH, BECOMING NORTHWEST IN THE AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
LOWS AROUND 40

CLEAR
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S

MOSTLY CLEAR
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
LOWS AROUND 50

PARTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
LOWS IN THE MID 50S
